name: New Window
description: Creates a new window (full-screen area) within the current session.

name: Next Window
description: Moves to the next window in the window list.

name: Previous Window
description: Moves to the previous window in the window list.

name: Rename Window
description: Prompts to rename the current window to a custom label.

name: Kill Window
description: Closes the current window and all panes within it.

name: Choose Window
description: Opens an interactive list to visually select and switch to a window.

name: Split Pane Horizontal
description: Splits the current pane into two side-by-side panes (vertical split line).

name: Split Pane Vertical
description: Splits the current pane into two stacked panes (horizontal split line).

name: Select Pane Left
description: Moves focus to the pane to the left of the current pane.

name: Select Pane Right
description: Moves focus to the pane to the right of the current pane.

name: Select Pane Up
description: Moves focus to the pane above the current pane.

name: Select Pane Down
description: Moves focus to the pane below the current pane.

name: Kill Pane
description: Closes the current pane. If it is the last pane in a window, the window is also closed.

name: Toggle Zoom (Fullscreen Pane)
description: Temporarily expands the current pane to fill the entire window. Press again to restore the layout.

name: Resize Pane Left
description: Shrinks the current pane from the right, expanding the pane to the left.

name: Resize Pane Right
description: Expands the current pane to the right, shrinking the pane on the right.

name: Detach Session
description: Detaches from the current session, leaving it running in the background for later reattachment.

name: New Session
description: Creates a new independent session. Typically invoked from the command line before attaching.

name: List Sessions
description: Lists all active sessions and allows switching between them interactively.

name: Rename Session
description: Prompts to rename the current session to a custom identifier.

name: Choose Session
description: Opens an interactive session switcher to visually browse and switch between sessions.

name: Enter Copy Mode
description: Enters copy/scroll mode, allowing keyboard navigation through the scrollback buffer.

name: Scroll Up in Copy Mode
description: Scrolls up through the scrollback buffer while in copy mode.

name: Scroll Down in Copy Mode
description: Scrolls down through the scrollback buffer while in copy mode.

name: Search in Copy Mode
description: Searches for text within the scrollback buffer while in copy mode.

name: Paste Buffer
description: Pastes the most recently copied text from the multiplexer's internal clipboard buffer.

name: List Keys
description: Displays a list of all configured key bindings for the current mode.

name: Command Prompt
description: Opens an internal command prompt to enter multiplexer commands directly.

name: Reload Config
description: Reloads the multiplexer configuration file without restarting the session.

name: Show Clock
description: Displays a large digital clock in the current pane.
